name: kh-uaf
description: KH Universal Agent Framework skills, lightweight request routing, SIDE-style scenario evaluation, science-style support files, executable smoke checks, practical quality gates, KH-Bench Verified benchmark tasks, DAG role artifact orchestration, deliverable exports, evidence gates, retention cleanup, and local orchestration harnesses for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Personal UAF skillbook and orchestration harness.
interface.longDescription: KH UAF packages host-readable skills with bundled usage references, minimal workflow examples, executable smoke checks, lightweight request-complexity routing, SIDE-style scenario evaluation for routing/evidence/gate/resume behavior, 10-point advisory skill structure scoring, deterministic offline CLI smoke runs, KH-Bench Verified practical task evaluation with SIDE regression cases, practical release quality gating, goal and memory state, domain design artifacts, DAG-based role orchestration with runtime role artifacts, standard-template functional specification exports, metadata-only deliverable quality, render QA, traceability, role execution audit harnesses, operational skill target audits, evidence-enforced review/QA gates, retention cleanup, and local Python orchestration contracts for Codex workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use KH UAF to plan and run this project.
List the KH UAF skills available here.
Run KH-Bench Verified for this UAF checkout.
Resume the current UAF goal ledger.
